subcategory: progressive-reveal landing hero with animated elements
use_cases: Landing page entry point with animated progressive reveal of content
Product or service showcase section with call-to-action buttons
SaaS/digital product hero with animated visual elements
Dark-themed landing section with red accent CTAs
Animated feature introduction or value proposition display
ai_summary: A progressive hero component with animated elements that reveal content progressively, featuring a dark glass-morphism aesthetic with red accent colors and motion effects. Includes customizable buttons and is designed for landing pages where visual impact and engagement are priorities.
